description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build on Ubuntu that runs on push to master, tags starting with v, and specific paths, as well as on pull requests and workflow dispatch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build on ubuntu-latest with different build types and LuaJIT configurations. It checks out the code, initializes CodeQL for Debug builds, installs CMake and dependencies, builds with CMake, performs CodeQL analysis for Debug builds, and uploads the build artifact.
